nasb.text: and said to him, ‘Leave your country and your relatives, and come into the land that I will show you.’

esv.text: and said to him, ‘Go out from your land and from your kindred and go into the land that I will show you.’

cnv.text: 對他說：‘你要離開本地本族，到我指示你的地方去。’

ccb.text: ‘你要离开家乡和亲族，到我要指示你的地方去。’

csbs.text: 对他说： ‘你要离开你的故土和亲族， 到我所要指示你的地方去。’
